subtask: Summarize 10 Tableau dashboards into 6 stakeholder-ready insights for a Monthly Business Review using GPT

items.title: awesome-chatgpt-prompts
items.snippet: A Python repository: This repo includes ChatGPT prompt curation to use ChatGPT and other LLM tools better.
items.reflection: - adjacent: the content is related as it provides information on chatgpt prompt curation which could help in improving the learner's skills in prompt engineering. however, it does not directly address the specific task of summarizing tableau dashboards into stakeholder-ready insights using gpt.
items.description: A Python repository: This repo includes ChatGPT prompt curation to use ChatGPT and other LLM tools better.
items.why: "By exploring the 'awesome-chatgpt-prompts' Python repository, you'll gain an understanding of how to curate prompts for ChatGPT and other language model tools. This knowledge is crucial for your use case as it enables the creation of AI-generated, insight-ready slides for monthly business reviews. In the context of healthcare claims, these prompts can be tailored to extract specific data and generate meaningful insights.
